## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `arch-guard check ...` with config '...'
2. See error

What should have happened instead.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error output if any.

## Environment

- Runtime: [e.g. Bun 1.3.x, Node 20.x]
- arch-guard version: [e.g. 0.1.0]

```yaml
# Your .archguard.yml (if applicable)
```
